basic_details.job_title: Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Paradip Port Authority has released the official Traffic Manager (HOD) Notification 2026 under Advt No. AD/RSC-I-21-13/(2017)/2026 (Pt.-I)/1240 at https://paradipport.gov.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Traffic Manager (HOD) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 45 years with a Degree and 15 years of experience in shipping/cargo operations/railway transportation in executive cadre can apply online. The application process is active and will continue until 30 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.details: A degree from a recognized university. 15 years experience in the shipping/ cargo Operations / railway transportation in executive cadre in an Industrial/ Commercial/ Govt. undertaking.

salary_details.details: Pay Scale: Rs. 1,00,000-2,60,000 (Pre-Revised Rs. 18500-23900). Will be elevated to Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000 after 3 years of regular service.

selection_process: Selection is by merit for which the bench mark in overall grading in the Annual Confidential Reports will not be below "Very Good".
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager (HOD) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Paradip Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager (HOD) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager (HOD) post is 30th May 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Traffic Manager (HOD) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a degree from a recognized university. Additionally, 15 years of experience in shipping, cargo operations, or railway transportation in an executive cadre within an industrial, commercial, or government undertaking is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Traffic Manager (HOD) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Traffic Manager (HOD) post is 45 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Traffic Manager (HOD) role?
faq.answer: The Traffic Manager (HOD) will receive a pay scale of Rs. 1,00,000-2,60,000. After three years of regular service, this will be elevated to Rs. 1,20,000-2,80,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Traffic Manager (HOD) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Traffic Manager (HOD) at the Paradip Port Authority.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Paradip Port Authority Traffic Manager (HOD) recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to register and apply through the official online application portal.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Deputation basis. Candidates will be selected for the post on deputation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Traffic Manager (HOD) post?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit. The benchmark for overall grading in Annual Confidential Reports should not be below "Very Good".

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Paradip Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Paradip Port Authority is located in Paradip, Odisha, with the pincode 754142.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
